tasks.label: Quarkus Dev - parametrages
tasks.command: Get-Content '${workspaceFolder}/.env' | ForEach-Object { if ($_ -match '^([^#][^=]*)=(.+)$') { Set-Item "env:$($Matches[1])" $Matches[2] } }; mvn quarkus:dev
